evidence.correctness_and_freshness: Endpoints used (geocoding-api.open-meteo.com/v1/search, api.open-meteo.com/v1/forecast with past_days, hourly=temperature_2m, timezone=auto) are internally consistent and match well-known Open-Meteo conventions. No version claim, but consistent.
evidence.executability: Backend code is syntactically valid and runnable. Frontend uses CRA + axios fine. Minor: no .env needed since Open-Meteo is keyless; no sandbox-infeasible patterns detected.
evidence.completeness: (a) N/A - no API key required, explicitly stated; (b) install commands present; (c) no env vars needed; (d) backend code present; (e) frontend code present; (f) test procedure described but no single runnable test command in a bash block.
evidence.citation_anchoring: No URLs to official Open-Meteo docs (open-meteo.com/en/docs) provided anywhere in the playbook.

rubric_notes: Keyless API; (a) and (c) of completeness rubric are satisfied by absence-with-explanation. Test step lacks fenced bash command but procedure is clear.
